'''sharate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:valleywise|valleywise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-r-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:valleywise|valleywise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sharate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:sharate|sharate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sharatesher|sharatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharatesherĂ«m|sharatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sharatero|sharatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharateshĂ«|sharateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharateshĂ«m|sharateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisharatero|gokisharatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharateshĂ«|gokisharateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharateshĂ«m|gokisharateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosharankerom|gosharankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharankeshĂ«|gosharankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharankeshĂ«m|gosharankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosharankeya|gosharankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sharaterom|sharaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharatemu|sharatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sharateya|sharateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisharaterom|gokisharaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharatemu|gokisharatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisharateya|gokisharateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:shararate|shararate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shararatesher|shararatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shararatesherĂ«m|shararatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shararatero|shararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shararateshĂ«|shararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shararateshĂ«m|shararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishararatero|gokishararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishararateshĂ«|gokishararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishararateshĂ«m|gokishararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshararankerom|goshararankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshararankeshĂ«|goshararankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshararankeshĂ«m|goshararankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshararankeya|goshararankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shararaterom|shararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shararatemu|shararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shararateya|shararateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishararaterom|gokishararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishararatemu|gokishararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishararateya|gokishararateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:shĂŠrĂŠte|shĂŠrĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shĂŠrĂŠtesher|shĂŠrĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m|shĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠrĂŠtero|shĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|shĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|shĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠrĂŠtero|gokishĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|gokishĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|gokishĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshĂŠrĂŠnkerom|goshĂŠrĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«|goshĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goshĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshĂŠrĂŠnkeya|goshĂŠrĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠrĂŠterom|shĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠrĂŠtemu|shĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shĂŠrĂŠteya|shĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠrĂŠterom|gokishĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠrĂŠtemu|gokishĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishĂŠrĂŠteya|gokishĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:shafrafte|shafrafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shafraftesher|shafraftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafraftesherĂ«m|shafraftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafraftero|shafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafrafteshĂ«|shafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafrafteshĂ«m|shafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafraftero|gokishafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafrafteshĂ«|gokishafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafrafteshĂ«m|gokishafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshafrafnkerom|goshafrafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafrafnkeshĂ«|goshafrafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafrafnkeshĂ«m|goshafrafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshafrafnkeya|goshafrafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafrafterom|shafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafraftemu|shafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shafrafteya|shafrafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafrafterom|gokishafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafraftemu|gokishafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishafrafteya|gokishafrafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
